property.name: flowApiName
property.label: Flow API Name
property.description: API Name of the Flow to launch in the modal

property.name: buttonLabel
property.label: Button label
property.description: Label of the button to launch flow in the modal

property.name: horizontalAlign
property.label: Button Alignment
property.description: Alignment of the button on the page

property.name: modalSize
property.label: Modal size
property.description: Size of the new task modal

property.name: modalHeader
property.label: Modal header label
property.description: Label of the Modal header, if any

property.name: modalSubHeader
property.label: Modal header content
property.description: Sub heading for the Modal header, if any
